title: What Transpired between Yusuf and Nagr in the Matter of Tribute
description: in the Matter Hof Tribute] According to 'Ali (al-Madi'ini)-his shaykhs: Yusuf b. 'Umar wrote to Nagr on that matter and ordered him to come to him with all his dependents. When Yusuf's letter reached Na4r, he raised tribute from the people of Khurasan and his agents.574 He made ready every slave, female and male, and every spirited horse in Khurasan, and he bought a thousand slaves, equipped them with weapons, and mounted them on horses.575 Some reports said: Nagr made ready…

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 26
